scripts.e2e: corepack pnpm db:local:start && DATABASE_URL=postgresql://sportil:sportil@localhost:5432/sportil corepack pnpm db:migrate && DATABASE_URL=postgresql://sportil:sportil@localhost:5432/sportil corepack pnpm db:seed && playwright test
scripts.build:api: corepack pnpm --filter @sportil/db build && corepack pnpm --filter @sportil/payments build && corepack pnpm --filter @sportil/api build
scripts.build:all: corepack pnpm build:api && corepack pnpm --filter @sportil/web build
